cast.name: 奥莱西亚·哲莱兹尼亚克 Olesya Zheleznyak

writer.name: 拉里萨·萨迪洛娃 Larisa Sadilova

director.name: 拉里萨·萨迪洛娃 Larisa Sadilova

introduction: Eight-year-old Lyubochka firmly believes that her father is a captain. But adults dismiss it as a childish fantasy.During the summer at a pioneer camp, she learns to stand up for herself while dreaming of meeting her father. Later, she travels to Crimea with her grandmother, who knows the truth but remains silent, unwilling to let her granddaughter go.This is not just a story about a girl waiting for her father. It is a glimpse into the 1970s USSR— a lost world whose traces we still seek. A story of family, memory, and a faith so strong it can turn dreams into reality.
